description: Wooden fragment of dedicatory inscription installed under Torah ark, part 3/3 (Part 1 no longer extant), part 2 is S 727e. Inscription reads: “Because as for me, in the abundance of Your loving kindness I will come into Your house. I will bow down toward Your holy sanctuary in fear of You.” (Psalm 5:8). Information from Ariel Fein and the Jewish Museum.
